# https://llmstxt.txt
# Full manifest for AI crawlers - comprehensive site documentation

Version: 1.0
Date: 2026-04-05

Last Modified: 2026-04-05
Change Frequency: weekly
Retry After: 86400

Sitemap: https://guildpost.tech/sitemap.xml
Documentation: https://guildpost.tech/docs

---

## SITE OVERVIEW

Guild Post (guildpost.tech) is a Minecraft server list website that helps players find the best PvP servers with real-time status checks, filtering, sorting, and voting.

Base URL: https://guildpost.tech
Contact: info@guildpost.tech

---

## MAIN PAGES

### Home Page (/)
- Server listing with grid/list view toggle
- Filters: sort (votes/players/latency/new), tag, version, search
- Pagination (20 servers per page)
- Real-time server status (online/offline, player count, latency)
- Ad banner placements: leaderboard, skyscraper (sidebar)
- FAQ section with contact form
- SEO: Schema.org ItemList for server listings

### Category Pages (/category/[category])
- Dynamic routes for server categories
- Filtered server lists by category tag

### Top Servers (/top)
- Top-ranked servers by votes

### Login (/login)
- User authentication page

### Dashboard (/dashboard)
- User dashboard (authenticated)

### Submit Server (/submit)
- Server submission form for owners

### Server Detail (/servers/[id])
- Individual server pages with full details

---

## API ROUTES

### Public APIs
- /api/v1/* - Public API endpoints
- /api/servers/* - Server listing and details
- /api/submit/* - Server submission handling
- /api/vote/* - Voting endpoints
- /api/cron/* - Scheduled jobs (status checking, etc.)

### Auth APIs
- /api/auth/* - Authentication endpoints
- /auth/callback - OAuth callback handler

---

## DATA MODEL

### Server Entity
```
id: string (UUID)
ip: string
port: number
name: string
description: string | null
version: string | null
tags: string[]
verified: boolean
vote_count: number
banner: string | null
icon: string | null
created_at: timestamp
```

### Server Status (related)
```
status: boolean (online/offline)
latency_ms: number | null
player_count: number
max_players: number
last_checked: timestamp
```

---

## FEATURES

### Server Filtering & Sorting
- By tags (PvP, Skyblock, Survival, etc.)
- By version (1.8, 1.12, 1.20, etc.)
- By sort: votes (default), players online, latency, newest
- Search by server name

### Voting System
- One vote per 24 hours per IP
- Optional review with vote
- VPN/Proxy votes blocked
- Votes > 15 days old auto-deleted
- Votifier support (NU Votes plugin)

### Real-time Status Checks
- Periodic latency/status polling
- Player count tracking
- Last checked timestamps

---

## AUTHENTICATION

- Supabase-based authentication
- OAuth providers (GitHub, etc.)
- Session-based auth with callback handling

---

## FRONTEND STACK

- Next.js 15+ (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Supabase (Postgres + Realtime)

---

## KEY ROUTES QUICK REFERENCE

| Route | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| / | Home - server listing |
| /category/[tag] | Category filtered list |
| /top | Top voted servers |
| /login | Login page |
| /dashboard | User dashboard |
| /submit | Submit new server |
| /servers/[id] | Server detail page |
